figures.caption: Fig. 2. Estimation error ∥θ̂i(t) − θ∗i ∥2 over a single realization of Algorithm 1 for a single agent. Dashed lines indicate the rate O(t−γ/2), γ = 2/3. Columns vary the probing parameter σ2. (Top row) ei(t) ∼ Unif [−0.5, 0.5]. (Bottom row) ei(t) is a Rademacher-distributed random variable on {±0.1}.

Fig. 1. Mean (solid) and ±1 standard deviation (shaded) of ∥θ̂i(t)−θ∗i ∥2 and t−1Rt over 100 independent realizations of Algorithm 1. Dashed lines indicate the a.s. convergence rates predicted in Theorem 3.

Fig. 3. Average regret t−1Rt over a single realization of Algorithm 1 for a single agent. Model noise is ei(t) ∼ N (0, 0.1). Dashed lines indicate the rate O(tγ−1 log t). Columns vary the probing parameter σ2 and rows vary the switching parameter γ.
